name: IndraNet
description: IndraNet — peer-to-peer interactive compute marketplace for renting idle gaming PCs as live GUI sessions.
currentFeature: backend hardening + API test coverage + DB schema fixes

milestones.title: v0.0.1 — release v0.0.1 — fix: web Docker build — pnpm-workspace.yaml, next.config.mjs, public dir
Marketplace UI with auth, host listing, booking flow
End-to-end session: register → browse → book → stream
Phase 0 PoC: Stripe-gated WebRTC stream end-to-end

lastCommit.subject: feat(web): handle session_state WebSocket event for instant ACTIVE transition

architecture.summary: Go backend (chi, pgx, stripe-go) + Next.js 14 web + PostgreSQL/Redis/NATS stack; Docker-only dev; WebRTC signaling hub; per-minute billing engine
